title: ConversationMeta
description:
Conversation metadata — the `meta.json` of a conversation subject.

Schema id: [`CONVERSATION_SCHEMA`] (`"animus.chat.conversation.v1"`). The
message log lives alongside in `messages.jsonl` as [`ChatMessage`] lines.

agent_profile.description: The agent profile (persona) bound to this conversation; `None` for ad-hoc.

model.description: Default model id for this conversation.

principal_id.description: RBAC principal that owns the conversation; `None` when unattributed.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent append.
